content:
✨ SAM3-UNet | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Adapting large foundation models like SAM3 for specific image segmentation tasks with minimal computational resources.
✨ Key Features: • Simplified adaptation of SAM3 • Parameter-efficient fine-tuning • Lightweight U-Net-style decoder • Low GPU memory usage (< 6GB) • Outperforms prior methods on tasks like mirror and salient object detection
📖 Summary: SAM3-UNet is a simplified adaptation of the Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3) designed for efficient fine-tuning on downstream tasks. It combines a SAM3 image encoder with a parameter-efficient adapter and a lightweight U-Net decoder, achieving competitive performance with significantly reduced GPU memory requirements.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
